assertions.assertion: Response explains that the default Microsoft OIDC/JWT handler maps 'sub' to the long XML URI 'http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2005/05/identity/claims/nameidentifier'
assertions.rationale: The response mentions the mapping to http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2005/05/identity/claims/nameidentifier.

assertions.assertion: Response recommends setting MapInboundClaims = false on the OIDC or JWT Bearer handler to preserve original claim names
Response shows setting TokenValidationParameters with NameClaimType = 'name' and RoleClaimType = 'role' so User.Identity.Name and role checks still work
assertions.rationale: TokenValidationParameters with NameClaimType and RoleClaimType are shown.

assertions.assertion: Response explains this is a common pitfall where claims are silently renamed by the handler
assertions.rationale: The response explains the mapping but doesn't explicitly call it a common pitfall or emphasize the silent nature of the rename.
